Selected Projects

FORGEDWorks

View all projects→
National Flag·2024

HIMALAYA

Government & Diplomatic

Full-height golden stand series supplied to government ministries and embassies — precision-matched Pantone colours to official specifications with reinforced pole fittings.

Brass pole & baseOfficial Pantone matchIndoor rated
Corporate Branding·2024

EVEREST

Trade Shows & Retail

Branded feather banners for outdoor trade shows and storefronts — double-sided sublimation printing on polyester knit with weighted cross-base for wind stability.

Double-sided printPolyester knit
Custom Print·2023

PASHUPATINATH

Diplomatic & Ceremonial

Gold-fringed ceremonial pennants for diplomatic exchange programs — custom artwork on satin with wooden hanger bar and tassels.

Satin fabricGold fringe finish
Desk & Table·2023

LUMBINI

Offices & Boardrooms

Crystal-base dual desk flags for bilateral meeting rooms — laser-etched branding on the base with chrome poles and miniature national flags.

Crystal baseChrome poles
Vehicle & Outdoor·2024

ANNAPURNA

VIP & Diplomatic Fleet

Car-mounted flag systems for diplomatic convoys and VIP vehicles — quick-attach magnetic base with flexible pole rated for highway speeds.

Magnetic mountHighway rated
View all projects→Order what you see on WhatsApp→

How We Work

MEASUREDProcess

Five steps in order — each stage gates the next, from first conversation through dispatch.

  1. 01

    Step 01 of 05

    Consultation

    From embassy ceremonial sets to Nepal national cricket jersey runs and corporate lobby banners, we begin by understanding purpose, viewing distance, and any regulatory spec. Timeline, budget, and installation context shape the brief.

    Next

  2. 02

    Step 02 of 05

    Design

    Our studio refines artwork to production separations, confirms Pantone or institutional colour references, and issues proofs before any yardage is committed.

    Next

  3. 03

    Step 03 of 05

    Material

    Fabric is selected for drape, wind load, and longevity — premium nylon, polyester, or knitted constructions depending on indoor, outdoor, or ceremonial use.

    Next

  4. 04

    Step 04 of 05

    Printing

    Direct-to-fabric digital, screen, or hybrid methods are matched to your graphic complexity. Each pass is monitored for registration and ink saturation.

    Next

  5. 05

    Step 05 of 05

    Delivery

    Finished pieces pass QC for stitch tension, hem integrity, and colour fidelity. We pack for safe transit across Nepal or coordinate international freight.

  1. 01

    Step 01 of 05

    Consultation

    From embassy ceremonial sets to Nepal national cricket jersey runs and corporate lobby banners, we begin by understanding purpose, viewing distance, and any regulatory spec. Timeline, budget, and installation context shape the brief.

    next
  2. 02

    Step 02 of 05

    Design

    Our studio refines artwork to production separations, confirms Pantone or institutional colour references, and issues proofs before any yardage is committed.

    next
  3. 03

    Step 03 of 05

    Material

    Fabric is selected for drape, wind load, and longevity — premium nylon, polyester, or knitted constructions depending on indoor, outdoor, or ceremonial use.

    next
  4. 04

    Step 04 of 05

    Printing

    Direct-to-fabric digital, screen, or hybrid methods are matched to your graphic complexity. Each pass is monitored for registration and ink saturation.

    next
  5. 05

    Step 05 of 05

    Delivery

    Finished pieces pass QC for stitch tension, hem integrity, and colour fidelity. We pack for safe transit across Nepal or coordinate international freight.

Have a brief in mind? Share specifications, timeline, and quantities — we respond within one business day.

Start a brief

हामी के गर्छौँ

PRINTSolutions

From custom flag printing to foil, paper, jersey, and banners, each service is built around clear output quality, practical timelines, and production-ready detail.

Six core service lines designed so buyers can compare options quickly and move forward without guesswork.

01

Custom Flag Printing

National, corporate, event, hand, table, and pole flags produced with color-accurate print and durable finishing for indoor and outdoor use.

02

Golden & Silver Foil Printing

Premium metallic foil finishing for invitations, certificates, labels, and ceremonial pieces where shine and contrast need to feel deliberate.

03

Paper Printing

Business cards, flyers, brochures, menus, posters, and branded stationery printed with clean typography, accurate tones, and consistent cuts.

04

Jersey Customization Printing

Team jerseys with names, numbers, sponsor marks, and tournament batches executed for readability, comfort, and repeat-order consistency.

05

Advertisement Banners

Flex banners, standees, roll-ups, and campaign displays built for storefronts, activations, fairs, and road-facing visibility.

06

Bulk & Custom Projects

Combined packages across flags, paper, jersey, and banner work scoped end-to-end for schools, clubs, events, and business launches.

Tell us what you need and we’ll scope it end-to-end — from artwork to delivery across Nepal.

Request a quoteBrowse catalogue
